NAVAREA XIX 111/15

ANDOYA SPACE CENTER WILL LAUNCH 2 SCIENTIFIC ROCKETS
SCHEDULED FROM 0530 TO 1030 UTC DAILY FROM 27 NOV TO 18 DES 15.
SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREAS.

AREA 1:
 A. 69-45.2N 15-51.4E
 B. 69-24.2N 15-55.4E
 C. 69-17.6N 16-00.5E
 D. 69-17.7N 16-01.4E
 E. 69-24.4N 16-05.2E
 F. 69-45.2N 16-05.1E

AREA 2:
AN AREA DEFINED BY A CIRCLE WITH IMPACT POINT:
70-28.9N 15-51.2E
RADIUS: 1,9 NM

AREA 3:
AN AREA DEFINED BY A CIRCLE WITH IMPACT POINT:
74-20.2N 15-51.2E
